name: Bujingi Boar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－イクタ
desc: If you control a "Bujin" monster: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls; change it to face-up Defense Position, and if you do, its DEF becomes 0 until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Bujin" monster: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls; change it to face-up Defense Position, and if you do, its DEF becomes 0 until the end of this turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
